prerequisites: A Mixmax account on an eligible annual plan (Growth+ or Enterprise), as API access is restricted to those plans.
A Mixmax API token (developer token) generated from your account settings.
A start date (start_date) marking the earliest point from which to replicate data.

authMethods.name: API key (X-API-Token)
authMethods.summary: Mixmax authenticates with a single API token. Supply it as the connector's api_key field. Mixmax accepts the token via the X-API-Token HTTP header (for example, curl --header "X-API-Token: <token>" https://api.mixmax.com/v1/users/me), or as the apiToken querystring parameter.

setupSteps.title: Confirm plan eligibility
setupSteps.body: Verify your Mixmax account is on an annual Growth+ or Enterprise plan. Mixmax restricts API access to these plans, so a token generated on other plans will not authorize API requests.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Mixmax API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Mixmax and open Settings, then Integrations, to create or copy your API token. The token is a value such as 45e99c6b-386d-4aa1-a2b4-296568a40ff2 and is sent to the Mixmax API base URL https://api.mixmax.com/v1/.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the token in the required api_key field. Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which the connector should replicate data.

setupSteps.title: Verify the credentials
setupSteps.body: Confirm the token works by calling an authenticated endpoint, for example GET https://api.mixmax.com/v1/users/me with the X-API-Token header set to your token. A successful response confirms the api_key is valid before running a sync.

sources.title: Introduction: REST API (getting started, authentication and base URL)
